questionHtml: Show that the value of the invariant spacetime interval between events 1 and 2 is 9600 ly2.
markschemeHtml:
1002 − 202 = 9600 «ly2» ✔

Also accept 98 (the square root of 9600).

Allow negative value.

meta.title: Show that the value of the invariant spacetime interval between events 1 and 2 is 9600 ly2.
